caption.court: 14th Circuit Court, Family Division, Muskegon County

affidavit_outline.affiant_address: 1977 Whitehall Road, Lot 17, North Muskegon, MI 49445

sections.text: I, Andrew James Pigors, am the Plaintiff in the above-captioned matter and the biological father of L.D.W.. I reside at 1977 Whitehall Road, Lot 17, North Muskegon, MI 49445.

I bring this emergency motion because L.D.W. faces immediate risk of harm. The record contains 12 aggression incidents, 37 medical events, and 51 interference incidents documented in the evidence below.

On or about October 20, 2024, , during a parenting exchange, Emily’s father, Albert Watson, forcibly removed LDW from my arms and acted aggressively, creating a hostile environment. (Source: d_drive_events.id=7)

On or about October 20, 2024, Albert Watson served a PPO violation during an exchange, mocking me and creating unnecessary tension. This misuse of legal processes is designed to intimidate and alienate. (Source: d_drive_events.id=24)
On or about October 20, 2024, Albert forcibly removed LDW from my arms during an exchange, throwing a PPO violation into my vehicle and mocking me. (Source: d_drive_events.id=25)
On or about October 20, 2024, Albert Watson accosts Andrew during a parenting exchange, taking Lincoln from his arms. (Source: d_drive_events.id=36)
On or about June 15, 2024, Andrew reports Lincoln’s rash worsening, but Emily dismisses medical concerns again. (Source: d_drive_events.id=56)
On or about June 15, 2024, , LDW returned to me with severe rashes that Emily had failed to address, leaving me to manage his medical care and comfort. (Source: d_drive_events.id=118)

On or about June 15, 2024, : LDW returned from Emily’s care with severe rashes on his body. Despite Andrew’s suggestion for medical attention, Emily dismissed the concern and failed to seek proper treatment. (Source: d_drive_events.id=206)
On or about May 15, 2024, Without consulting me, Emily made unilateral decisions regarding LDW’s vaccinations, only informing me afterward. (Source: d_drive_events.id=3)

On or about July 9, 2024, , Emily refused to involve me in discussions about extracurricular activities or sports for LDW, limiting my ability to support his interests. (Source: d_drive_events.id=184)
On or about June 1, 2024, Emily refused a weekly video call schedule, citing discomfort without proposing alternatives. (Source: d_drive_events.id=8)

On or about June 1, 2024, , and September 12, 2024, Emily denied my requests for scheduled video calls with LDW, claiming he "doesn’t want to talk." These refusals create a gap in our relationship and prevent LDW from maintaining the continuity of our bond during her parenting weeks. (Source: d_drive_events.id=127)

On or about June 1, 2024, , and September 12, 2024, Emily refused to allow scheduled video calls, claiming LDW “doesn’t want to talk.” These actions disrupt LDW’s sense of connection and emotional stability. (Source: d_drive_events.id=133)

On or about None, hearing,  Judge  McNeill  ordered  me to obtain  a psychological  assessment  from  HealtliWest. o   The  judge's  secretary  then  emailed  me, instructing  that  the completed HealthWest  evaluation  shoul (Source: evidence_quotes.id=66)
